description: Original Pawn 3.2.3664 syntax and semantics as commonly targeted by pre-2015 SA-MP gamemodes, without pawn-lang/open.mp compiler-specific bug fixes. Existing legacy scripts are treated as valid but not recommended under this profile (see language/implementation-defined.md), not modernized.

compiler.notes: The unmodified upstream Pawn 3.2.3664 compiler lineage predating pawn-lang/compiler's community fork.

references.note: Pawn 3.2.3664 ("Pawn 3.10") lineage reference, cross-checked during research; not the exclusive source for this profile's flags.
